query: SELECT cct.kind, COUNT(cc.id) FROM comp_cast_type cct, complete_cast cc WHERE cct.id = cc.status_id AND cc.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM title WHERE kind_id != 1 AND production_year < 1990) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM movie_info WHERE movie_id = cc.movie_id AND info_type_id = 3) GROUP BY cct.kind ORDER BY COUNT(cc.id) DESC;

SELECT rt.role, COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) FROM role_type rt, cast_info ci WHERE rt.id = ci.role_id AND ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM title WHERE production_year % 10 = 5) AND ci.nr_order < 10 GROUP BY rt.role HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) > 1000;

SELECT an.name, COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) FROM aka_name an, title t, cast_info ci WHERE an.person_id = ci.person_id AND ci.movie_id = t.id AND t.kind_id = 1 AND an.name_pcode_cf LIKE 'A%' AND ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'producer') GROUP BY an.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) BETWEEN 5 AND 15;

SELECT k.kind, COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) FROM kind_type k, title t WHERE k.id = t.kind_id AND t.production_year > 2000 AND t.id IN (SELECT movie_id FROM movie_companies WHERE company_id IN (SELECT id FROM company_name WHERE name_pcode_nf LIKE 'D%')) GROUP BY k.kind HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) > 100;

SELECT mk.movie_id, COUNT(k.keyword) FROM movie_keyword mk, keyword k WHERE mk.keyword_id = k.id AND k.phonetic_code LIKE 'S%' AND mk.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM title WHERE production_year = 2010 AND kind_id = 1) GROUP BY mk.movie_id HAVING COUNT(k.keyword) > 3;

SELECT lt.link, COUNT(ml.linked_movie_id) FROM link_type lt, movie_link ml WHERE lt.id = ml.link_type_id AND ml.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM title WHERE kind_id = 2) AND ml.linked_movie_id IN (SELECT movie_id FROM movie_info WHERE info LIKE '%sequel%') GROUP BY lt.link HAVING COUNT(ml.linked_movie_id) > 2;

SELECT cn.name, t.title FROM company_name cn, title t, movie_companies mc WHERE cn.id = mc.company_id AND mc.movie_id = t.id AND t.production_year = (SELECT production_year FROM title ORDER BY imdb_id DESC LIMIT 1) AND mc.note LIKE '%(co-production)%' AND t.kind_id NOT IN (3,6);

SELECT an.title, t.production_year FROM aka_title an, title t WHERE an.movie_id = t.id AND an.season_nr IS NOT NULL AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2005 AND 2015 AND an.episode_nr > (SELECT AVG(episode_nr) FROM aka_title WHERE season_nr = an.season_nr);

SELECT cn.country_code, COUNT(DISTINCT mc.movie_id) FROM company_name cn, movie_companies mc WHERE cn.id = mc.company_id AND mc.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM title WHERE production_year % 4 = 0) AND mc.company_type_id = 1 GROUP BY cn.country_code HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT mc.movie_id) > 50;

SELECT an.name, COUNT(DISTINCT ci.movie_id) FROM aka_name an, cast_info ci, role_type rt WHERE an.person_id = ci.person_id AND ci.role_id = rt.id AND rt.role = 'producer' AND ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM title WHERE production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2005) AND an.name_pcode_nf LIKE 'B%' GROUP BY an.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ci.movie_id) > (SELECT AVG(cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) cnt FROM cast_info GROUP BY person_id) sub);

SELECT cct.kind, COUNT(cc.movie_id) FROM comp_cast_type cct, complete_cast cc, movie_info_idx mii WHERE cct.id = cc.subject_id AND cc.movie_id = mii.movie_id AND mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating') AND mii.info::float BETWEEN 7.0 AND 8.0 AND cc.status_id = (SELECT id FROM comp_cast_type WHERE kind = 'complete') GROUP BY cct.kind HAVING COUNT(cc.movie_id) > 100;

SELECT lt.link, COUNT(DISTINCT ml.linked_movie_id) FROM link_type lt, movie_link ml, title t WHERE lt.id = ml.link_type_id AND ml.movie_id = t.id AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'tv series') AND ml.linked_movie_id IN (SELECT movie_id FROM movie_info WHERE info ~ '^\d{4}') AND t.production_year % 10 = 5 GROUP BY lt.link HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ml.linked_movie_id) > 3;

SELECT an.title, COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) FROM aka_title an, cast_info ci, role_type rt WHERE an.movie_id = ci.movie_id AND ci.role_id = rt.id AND rt.role = 'writer' AND an.production_year IS NULL AND an.episode_nr > (SELECT AVG(episode_nr) FROM aka_title WHERE season_nr = an.season_nr) GROUP BY an.title HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) > 1;

SELECT k.kind, COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) FROM kind_type k, title t, complete_cast cc WHERE k.id = t.kind_id AND t.id = cc.movie_id AND cc.status_id = (SELECT id FROM comp_cast_type WHERE kind = 'complete') AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2001 AND 2010 AND t.id NOT IN (SELECT movie_id FROM movie_link) GROUP BY k.kind HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) > 50;

SELECT mi.info, COUNT(DISTINCT mk.keyword_id) FROM movie_info mi, movie_keyword mk WHERE mi.movie_id = mk.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'languages') AND mi.info LIKE '%English%' AND mk.keyword_id IN (SELECT id FROM keyword WHERE keyword LIKE 'war%') GROUP BY mi.info HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT mk.keyword_id) > 2;

SELECT rt.role, COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) FROM role_type rt, cast_info ci, title t WHERE rt.id = ci.role_id AND ci.movie_id = t.id AND t.series_years ~ '\d{4}-\d{4}' AND ci.nr_order < 5 AND t.kind_id != 3 GROUP BY rt.role HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) > 100;

SELECT k.keyword, COUNT(mk.movie_id) FROM keyword k, movie_keyword mk, title t WHERE k.id = mk.keyword_id AND mk.movie_id = t.id AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'video game') AND t.production_year IS NULL GROUP BY k.keyword HAVING COUNT(mk.movie_id) > 1;

SELECT pi.info, COUNT(DISTINCT ci.movie_id) FROM person_info pi, cast_info ci WHERE pi.person_id = ci.person_id AND pi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'trivia') AND ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'actress') AND pi.info ~ '\d{4}' GROUP BY pi.info HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ci.movie_id) > 2;

SELECT k.kind, COUNT(DISTINCT cc.movie_id) FROM kind_type k, complete_cast cc, title t WHERE k.id = t.kind_id AND t.id = cc.movie_id AND cc.subject_id = (SELECT id FROM comp_cast_type WHERE kind = 'cast') AND t.episode_of_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY k.kind HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT cc.movie_id) > 10;

SELECT an.title, COUNT(DISTINCT mk.keyword_id) FROM aka_title an, movie_keyword mk WHERE an.movie_id = mk.movie_id AND an.kind_id = 4 AND mk.keyword_id IN (SELECT id FROM keyword WHERE phonetic_code LIKE 'F%') GROUP BY an.title HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT mk.keyword_id) > 1;
SELECT a.name, c.note FROM aka_name a JOIN cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id JOIN title t ON c.movie_id = t.id WHERE t.title = 'Inception' AND t.production_year = 2010
SELECT ml.link_type_id, t1.title, t2.title FROM movie_link ml JOIN title t1 ON ml.movie_id = t1.id JOIN title t2 ON ml.linked_movie_id = t2.id WHERE ml.link_type_id = 1
SELECT t.title, cct.kind FROM title t JOIN complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id JOIN comp_cast_type cct ON cc.subject_id = cct.id WHERE cc.status_id = 4
SELECT n.name FROM name n WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM cast_info ci JOIN title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id WHERE ci.person_id = n.id AND t.title = 'The Godfather')
SELECT t.title FROM title t WHERE t.id IN (SELECT ml.movie_id FROM movie_link ml WHERE ml.link_type_id = 2)
SELECT a.name, t.title FROM aka_name a JOIN cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id JOIN title t ON c.movie_id = t.id ORDER BY a.name LIMIT 10 OFFSET 100
SELECT cn.name, COUNT(mc.movie_id) FROM company_name cn JOIN movie_companies mc ON cn.id = mc.company_id GROUP BY cn.name HAVING COUNT(mc.movie_id) > 100
SELECT t.title, a.name FROM title t JOIN cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id WHERE t.production_year = 2010 AND a.name LIKE 'S%' LIMIT 100

SELECT t.title, k.keyword FROM title t JOIN movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005 AND k.keyword LIKE '%drama%' LIMIT 50
SELECT t1.title, t2.title FROM title t1 JOIN movie_link ml ON t1.id = ml.movie_id JOIN title t2 ON ml.linked_movie_id = t2.id WHERE t1.production_year = 1990 AND ml.link_type_id = 1

SELECT a.name, t.title FROM aka_name a JOIN cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id JOIN title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id JOIN movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id WHERE mk.keyword_id = 500 LIMIT 20
SELECT n.name FROM name n JOIN cast_info ci ON n.id = ci.person_id JOIN title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id WHERE t.title LIKE '%Matrix%' AND ci.role_id = 2
SELECT t.title, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie_keyword mk WHERE mk.movie_id = t.id) AS keyword_count FROM title t JOIN movie_link ml ON t.id = ml.linked_movie_id WHERE ml.link_type_id = 3

SELECT k.keyword, COUNT(t.id) FROM keyword k JOIN movie_keyword mk ON k.id = mk.keyword_id JOIN title t ON mk.movie_id = t.id WHERE t.production_year = 2012 AND k.keyword LIKE '%sci-fi%' GROUP BY k.keyword

SELECT n.name, t.title FROM name n JOIN cast_info ci ON n.id = ci.person_id JOIN title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id JOIN movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id WHERE mi.info_type_id = 3 AND mi.info = 'Horror' ORDER BY t.production_year DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT * FROM person_info pi JOIN name n ON pi.person_id = n.id JOIN aka_name an ON n.id = an.person_id JOIN info_type it ON pi.info_type_id = it.id WHERE it.info = 'birth date' AND an.name LIKE '%John%';
SELECT * FROM aka_title at JOIN title t ON at.movie_id = t.id JOIN cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id JOIN name n ON ci.person_id = n.id WHERE at.title LIKE '%Part%' AND n.name LIKE '%Smith%';

SELECT * FROM title t JOIN movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id JOIN movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id WHERE k.keyword = 'marvel-cinematic-universe' AND mi.info_type_id = 3;

SELECT * FROM movie_link ml JOIN title t1 ON ml.movie_id = t1.id JOIN title t2 ON ml.linked_movie_id = t2.id JOIN movie_keyword mk ON t1.id = mk.movie_id JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id WHERE ml.link_type_id = 1 AND k.keyword = 'sequel';

SELECT * FROM movie_info mi JOIN title t ON mi.movie_id = t.id JOIN movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id WHERE t.production_year > 2010 AND k.keyword = 'sequel';
SELECT * FROM person_info pi WHERE pi.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'birth date') AND pi.person_id IN (SELECT id FROM name WHERE gender = 'f');

SELECT * FROM name n WHERE n.id IN (SELECT person_id FROM person_info pi WHERE pi.info_type_id = 19 AND pi.info LIKE '%Oscar%') AND n.id IN (SELECT person_id FROM cast_info ci WHERE ci.role_id = 1 AND ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM title WHERE production_year > 2010));

SELECT * FROM complete_cast cc JOIN title t ON cc.movie_id = t.id JOIN cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id JOIN name n ON ci.person_id = n.id JOIN role_type rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id WHERE cc.subject_id = 1 AND rt.role = 'director' AND n.gender = 'f';

SELECT * FROM movie_companies mc JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id JOIN movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id WHERE cn.country_code = '[jp]' AND ct.kind = 'production companies' AND k.keyword = 'anime';

SELECT * FROM person_info pi JOIN info_type it ON pi.info_type_id = it.id JOIN name n ON pi.person_id = n.id JOIN aka_name an ON n.id = an.person_id WHERE it.info = 'birth date' AND an.name LIKE '%Jr.%';

SELECT * FROM movie_info_idx mii JOIN info_type it ON mii.info_type_id = it.id JOIN title t ON mii.movie_id = t.id JOIN movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id WHERE it.info = 'votes' AND k.keyword = 'based-on-book';

SELECT * FROM movie_link ml JOIN link_type lt ON ml.link_type_id = lt.id JOIN title t1 ON ml.movie_id = t1.id JOIN title t2 ON ml.linked_movie_id = t2.id JOIN movie_info mi ON t1.id = mi.movie_id WHERE lt.link = 'remake of' AND mi.info_type_id = 1;

SELECT mi.info, mi_idx.info FROM movie_info mi JOIN movie_info_idx mi_idx ON mi.movie_id = mi_idx.movie_id JOIN info_type it1 ON mi.info_type_id = it1.id JOIN info_type it2 ON mi_idx.info_type_id = it2.id WHERE it1.info = 'genres' AND it2.info = 'rating' AND mi.movie_id IN (SELECT mk.movie_id FROM movie_keyword mk WHERE mk.keyword_id IN (SELECT k.id FROM keyword k WHERE k.keyword = 'superhero'))

SELECT t.title, mi.info FROM title t JOIN movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id JOIN movie_info_idx mi_idx ON t.id = mi_idx.movie_id WHERE t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie') AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'plot') AND mi_idx.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes') AND t.production_year = 1999 + 1

SELECT an.name, t.title FROM aka_name an JOIN cast_info ci ON an.person_id = ci.person_id JOIN title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id JOIN movie_link ml ON t.id = ml.linked_movie_id WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2000 AND ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'producer') AND ml.link_type_id = (SELECT id FROM link_type WHERE link = 'features')

SELECT cn.name, COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) FROM char_name cn JOIN cast_info ci ON cn.id = ci.person_role_id JOIN title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id JOIN movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id WHERE t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'tv series') AND mc.company_id IN (SELECT id FROM company_name WHERE name_pcode_nf LIKE 'D%') GROUP BY cn.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) BETWEEN 5 AND 20

SELECT k.keyword, t.title FROM keyword k JOIN movie_keyword mk ON k.id = mk.keyword_id JOIN title t ON mk.movie_id = t.id JOIN complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id WHERE cc.status_id = (SELECT id FROM comp_cast_type WHERE kind = 'complete') AND t.id IN (SELECT movie_id FROM movie_info WHERE info = 'PG-13') AND k.phonetic_code LIKE 'A%'

SELECT pi.info, n.name FROM person_info pi JOIN info_type it ON pi.info_type_id = it.id JOIN name n ON pi.person_id = n.id WHERE it.info = 'mini biography' AND pi.person_id IN (SELECT ci.person_id FROM cast_info ci WHERE ci.movie_id IN (SELECT t.id FROM title t WHERE t.production_year = 2010 - 5)) AND n.name_pcode_cf LIKE 'B%'

SELECT cn.name, rt.role FROM char_name cn JOIN cast_info ci ON cn.id = ci.person_role_id JOIN role_type rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id JOIN movie_keyword mk ON ci.movie_id = mk.movie_id WHERE rt.role = 'actress' AND mk.keyword_id IN (SELECT id FROM keyword WHERE keyword LIKE '%mystery%') AND ci.movie_id IN (SELECT movie_id FROM movie_info WHERE info LIKE '%color%')

SELECT n.name, t.title FROM name n JOIN aka_name an ON n.id = an.person_id JOIN cast_info ci ON n.id = ci.person_id JOIN title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id WHERE an.name LIKE '%Tom%' AND t.id IN (SELECT movie_id FROM movie_companies WHERE company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'distributors')) AND t.production_year = 2005 + 3

SELECT n.name, ci.role_id, cn.name FROM name n JOIN cast_info ci ON n.id = ci.person_id JOIN char_name cn ON ci.person_role_id = cn.id JOIN title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id JOIN role_type rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id WHERE rt.role = 'actress' AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie') AND ci.note LIKE '%(uncredited)%' AND cn.name ILIKE '%doctor%' AND t.production_year < 1995;

SELECT t.title, cct.kind, cc.subject_id FROM complete_cast cc JOIN comp_cast_type cct ON cc.status_id = cct.id JOIN title t ON cc.movie_id = t.id JOIN movie_info_idx mi_idx ON t.id = mi_idx.movie_id WHERE cct.kind = 'complete' AND mi_idx.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes') AND mi_idx.info::integer > 1000 AND t.id IN (SELECT movie_id FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id = (SELECT id FROM link_type WHERE link = 'follows'));

SELECT t.title, mi_idx.info, mk.keyword_id FROM title t JOIN movie_info_idx mi_idx ON t.id = mi_idx.movie_id JOIN movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id JOIN movie_link ml ON t.id = ml.movie_id WHERE mi_idx.info_type_id + 10 = (SELECT id + 10 FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating') AND mk.keyword_id BETWEEN 1000 AND 2000 AND ml.link_type_id = (SELECT id FROM link_type WHERE link = 'referenced in') AND t.production_year % 10 = 5;

SELECT n1.name, n2.name FROM name n1 JOIN cast_info ci1 ON n1.id = ci1.person_id JOIN cast_info ci2 ON ci1.movie_id = ci2.movie_id JOIN name n2 ON ci2.person_id = n2.id WHERE ci1.role_id != ci2.role_id AND ci1.nr_order = 1 AND ci2.nr_order = 2 AND ci1.movie_id IN (SELECT movie_id FROM movie_info WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'plot') AND info LIKE '%friendship%');

SELECT mi1.movie_id, mi2.info FROM movie_info mi1 JOIN movie_info mi2 ON mi1.movie_id = mi2.movie_id WHERE mi1.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'certificates') AND mi2.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'release dates') AND mi1.info LIKE '%PG-13%' AND mi2.info ~ '201[2-5]' AND mi1.movie_id IN (SELECT movie_id FROM movie_keyword WHERE keyword_id IN (SELECT id FROM keyword WHERE phonetic_code LIKE 'A%'));
